Achref Abada.note: Abada gives Algeria another goalkeeper option, useful depth for shot-stopping and managing crowded boxes.
Achref Abada.noteZh: 阿巴达给阿尔及利亚另一个门将选择，是扑救和处理拥挤禁区的有用深度。

Adil Boulbina.note: Boulbina adds a young wide threat, useful when Algeria need direct carries and quick shots.
Adil Boulbina.noteZh: 布尔比纳增加年轻边路威胁，当阿尔及利亚需要直接带球和快速射门时很有用。

Aissa Mandi.note: Mandi gives Algeria veteran defensive balance, steady in aerial duels and first passes from the back.
Aissa Mandi.noteZh: 曼迪给阿尔及利亚老练防守平衡，空中对抗和后场第一脚传球都很稳定。

Amine Gouiri.note: Gouiri gives Algeria a forward who can connect attacks, drift inside, and still finish around the box.
Amine Gouiri.noteZh: 古伊里给阿尔及利亚能串联进攻的前锋，可内收活动，也能在禁区附近终结。

Anis Hadj Moussa.note: Hadj Moussa gives Algeria a sharp isolation winger, dangerous when he can attack a full-back alone.
Anis Hadj Moussa.noteZh: 哈吉·穆萨给阿尔及利亚犀利的一对一边锋，当他能单挑边后卫时很危险。

Fares Chaibi.note: Chaïbi gives Algeria delivery and invention, especially from set pieces and half-space crosses.
Fares Chaibi.noteZh: 沙伊比给阿尔及利亚传球和创造力，尤其体现在定位球和肋部传中。

Fares Ghedjemis.note: Ghedjemis adds wide speed, useful when Algeria want to attack before the defense settles.
Fares Ghedjemis.noteZh: 格杰米斯增加边路速度，当阿尔及利亚想在防线站稳前进攻时很有用。

Hicham Boudaoui.note: Boudaoui gives Algeria midfield mobility, carrying through pressure and covering loose second balls.
Hicham Boudaoui.noteZh: 布道维给阿尔及利亚中场机动性，能带球穿过压力并覆盖松散第二落点。

Houssem Aouar.note: Aouar gives Algeria between-lines craft, turning controlled possession into late runs and final passes.
Houssem Aouar.noteZh: 奥亚尔给阿尔及利亚两线之间的技术，能把控球转成后插上和最后一传。

Ibrahim Maza.note: Maza adds young central creativity, useful against compact blocks that require quick touches.
Ibrahim Maza.noteZh: 马扎增加年轻中路创造力，适合面对需要快速触球破解的密集防守。

Jaouen Hadjam.note: Hadjam gives Algeria left-side energy, overlapping aggressively while still recovering into shape.
Jaouen Hadjam.noteZh: 哈贾姆给阿尔及利亚左侧活力，能积极套上，同时回到阵型。

Luca Zidane.note: Zidane gives Algeria a composed goalkeeper option, comfortable restarting attacks after saves.
Luca Zidane.noteZh: 齐达内给阿尔及利亚冷静的门将选择，能在扑救后舒服地重新发起进攻。

Melvin Mastil.note: Mastil adds goalkeeper depth, useful for training competition and cover across the tournament.
Melvin Mastil.noteZh: 马斯蒂尔增加门将深度，适合队内竞争和整届赛事的保障。

Mohamed Amine Tougai.note: Tougai gives Algeria penalty-area protection, important when games turn into crosses and clearances.
Mohamed Amine Tougai.noteZh: 图盖给阿尔及利亚禁区保护，当比赛变成传中和解围时很重要。

Mohamed Amoura.note: Amoura gives Algeria explosive depth, stretching the line and turning counters into shots quickly.
Mohamed Amoura.noteZh: 阿穆拉给阿尔及利亚爆发纵深，能拉伸防线并快速把反击转成射门。

Nabil Bentaleb.note: Bentaleb gives Algeria a deeper passing base, useful for controlling rhythm and protecting the center.
Nabil Bentaleb.noteZh: 本塔莱布给阿尔及利亚更靠后的传球基础，适合控制节奏并保护中路。

Nadhir Benbouali.note: Benbouali gives Algeria forward depth, pressing defenders and attacking loose balls around the box.
Nadhir Benbouali.noteZh: 本布阿利给阿尔及利亚锋线深度，能压迫后卫并攻击禁区附近松散球。

Oussama Benbot.note: Benbot gives Algeria domestic goalkeeper experience, useful when set pieces create pressure.
Oussama Benbot.noteZh: 本博特给阿尔及利亚本土门将经验，当定位球制造压力时很有用。

Rak Belghali.note: Belghali gives Algeria right-side running, helping stretch attacks while recovering into the back line.
Rak Belghali.noteZh: 贝尔加利给阿尔及利亚右侧跑动，能拉开进攻并回收到防线。

Ramy Bensebaini.note: Bensebaini gives Algeria left-side authority, defending the box and adding set-piece danger.
Ramy Bensebaini.noteZh: 本塞拜尼给阿尔及利亚左侧权威，能防守禁区并增加定位球威胁。

Ramiz Zerrouki.note: Zerrouki gives Algeria a midfield metronome, keeping the ball moving and contesting second balls.
Ramiz Zerrouki.noteZh: 泽鲁基给阿尔及利亚中场节拍器，能让球运转并争抢第二落点。

Rayan Ait-Nouri.note: Aït-Nouri gives Algeria a high-upside left flank, carrying past pressure and creating from deep.
Rayan Ait-Nouri.noteZh: 艾特-努里给阿尔及利亚高上限左路，能带球摆脱压力并从后场创造。

Riyad Mahrez.note: Mahrez remains Algeria's creative reference, shaping attacks with his left foot and calm final ball.
Riyad Mahrez.noteZh: 马赫雷斯仍是阿尔及利亚创造核心，用左脚和冷静最后一传塑造进攻。

Samir Chergui.note: Chergui gives Algeria defensive depth, useful for aerial spells and simple buildup under pressure.
Samir Chergui.noteZh: 谢尔吉给阿尔及利亚防守深度，适合空中球阶段和压力下简单组织。

Yassine Titraoui.note: Titraoui adds midfield craft, helping Algeria keep the ball when pressure closes around him.
Yassine Titraoui.noteZh: 蒂特拉维增加中场技术，帮助阿尔及利亚在压力逼近时保住球权。

Zineddine Belaid.note: Belaïd gives Algeria another centre-back organiser, strong when the line must manage crosses.
Zineddine Belaid.noteZh: 贝莱德给阿尔及利亚另一名中卫组织者，当防线需要处理传中时很可靠。
